---
name: "Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an idea or improvement for safeenv"
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Focus on the *problem*, not the solution. What are you trying to do that's currently annoying or impossible?
Example: "Every time I add a new import I have to manually re-run freeze. I wish it could watch for changes." -->

## What would you like safeenv to do?

<!-- As specific as you can be. If it's a new command or flag, show what it might look like: -->

```bash
python -m safeenv <your-idea-here>
```

```
# expected output
```

## Have you tried anything else?

<!-- Did you work around it somehow? Did you look at other tools? Why didn't those work? -->

## Who would use this?

<!-- Beginners? Data scientists? Teams? Solo devs? How common do you think this use case is? -->

## Anything else?

<!-- References, screenshots, links to similar features in other tools — whatever helps. -->

---

- [ ] Searched existing issues — not a duplicate
- [ ] Described the use case, not just the implementation
- [ ] This fits safeenv's goal of making Python environments less painful
